name: exedev
description: A Pulumi provider for managing exe.dev VMs.

endpoint.description: Override for the exe.dev exec endpoint.

token.description: exe.dev bearer API token. Generate with `ssh exe.dev ssh-key generate-api-key --exp=30d`.

endpoint.description: Override for the exe.dev exec endpoint.

token.description: exe.dev bearer API token. Generate with `ssh exe.dev ssh-key generate-api-key --exp=30d`.

endpoint.description: Override for the exe.dev exec endpoint.

token.description: exe.dev bearer API token. Generate with `ssh exe.dev ssh-key generate-api-key --exp=30d`.

exedev:index:Domain.description: A custom domain linked to an exe.dev VM.

hostname.description: The custom hostname (a CNAME you already point at the VM). Changing this replaces the domain.

vm.description: Name of the VM to attach the domain to. Changing this replaces the domain.

wildcard.description: Issue a wildcard (*.<parent>) certificate via DNS-01 delegation.

hostname.description: The custom hostname (a CNAME you already point at the VM). Changing this replaces the domain.

vm.description: Name of the VM to attach the domain to. Changing this replaces the domain.

wildcard.description: Issue a wildcard (*.<parent>) certificate via DNS-01 delegation.

exedev:index:Integration.description: An exe.dev integration. Currently models the http-proxy type, which injects auth/headers into requests from attached VMs to a target URL.

attachments.description: Where the integration is mounted: vm:<name>, tag:<name>, or auto:all.

bearer.description: Bearer token to inject (shorthand for an Authorization: Bearer header).

comment.description: Free-form comment stored with the integration.

name.description: Integration name (unique). Changing this replaces the integration.

noAuth.description: Create the http-proxy with no injected authentication.

target.description: Target URL the http-proxy forwards to.

type.description: Integration type. Defaults to http-proxy. Changing this replaces the integration.

attachments.description: Where the integration is mounted: vm:<name>, tag:<name>, or auto:all.

bearer.description: Bearer token to inject (shorthand for an Authorization: Bearer header).

comment.description: Free-form comment stored with the integration.

name.description: Integration name (unique). Changing this replaces the integration.

noAuth.description: Create the http-proxy with no injected authentication.

target.description: Target URL the http-proxy forwards to.

type.description: Integration type. Defaults to http-proxy. Changing this replaces the integration.

exedev:index:SshKey.description: An SSH public key registered on your exe.dev account.

publicKey.description: The SSH public key (e.g. 'ssh-ed25519 AAAA... comment'). The comment sets the key name. Changing this replaces the key.

tag.description: Scope the key to VMs carrying this tag. Changing this replaces the key.

publicKey.description: The SSH public key (e.g. 'ssh-ed25519 AAAA... comment'). The comment sets the key name. Changing this replaces the key.

tag.description: Scope the key to VMs carrying this tag. Changing this replaces the key.

exedev:index:Vm.description: A persistent Linux VM on exe.dev.

command.description: Container command: auto, none, or a custom command. Changing this replaces the VM.

comment.description: Short note about the VM (max 200 bytes).

disk.description: Disk size, e.g. 20GB. Can only grow; shrinking replaces the VM.

env.description: Environment variables. Changing these replaces the VM.

image.description: Container image (e.g. ubuntu:22.04). Changing this replaces the VM.

integrations.description: Integrations to attach at creation. Changing these replaces the VM.

name.description: VM name. Auto-generated by exe.dev if omitted. Changing this replaces the VM.

port.description: Container port the HTTP proxy forwards to.

prompt.description: Initial prompt sent to Shelley after creation (requires the exeuntu image). Applied only at create time.

public.description: Make the HTTP proxy publicly accessible. Defaults to private.

receiveEmail.description: Enable inbound email delivery to the VM.

registryAuth.description: Private registry credentials as USERNAME:PASSWORD for the --image registry.

setupScript.description: Setup script run on first boot. Changing this replaces the VM.

teamAccess.description: Allow team members SSH, Shelley, and web-proxy access to the VM.

prompt.description: Initial prompt sent to Shelley after creation (requires the exeuntu image). Applied only at create time.

public.description: Make the HTTP proxy publicly accessible. Defaults to private.

receiveEmail.description: Enable inbound email delivery to the VM.

registryAuth.description: Private registry credentials as USERNAME:PASSWORD for the --image registry.

setupScript.description: Setup script run on first boot. Changing this replaces the VM.

teamAccess.description: Allow team members SSH, Shelley, and web-proxy access to the VM.

exedev:index:getVm.description: Look up an existing exe.dev VM by name.

name.description: Name of the VM to look up.
